title.description: Main title rendered in the bar (or as a large title when variant='large').

subtitle.description: Optional secondary line below the title.

leading.description: Element placed at the start of the bar after the back button (e.g., logo, avatar, menu icon).

onBack.description: Click handler for the back button. When provided, the back button is shown automatically.

backLabel.description: Accessible/text label for the back button. Hidden visually on screens below the small breakpoint.

showBack.description: Force showing/hiding the back button. Defaults to true when onBack is set.

variant.description: Visual layout. 'centered' centers the title between leading/actions (iOS-style). 'large' renders an iOS-style large title that collapses on scroll. 'transparent' removes background and border. 'compact' is a slim toolbar.

bordered.description: Show a thin border under the bar.

elevated.description: Replace the bottom border with a soft drop shadow.

safeArea.description: Apply env(safe-area-inset-*) padding so the bar respects iOS notches and home indicator.

collapseOnScroll.description: When variant='large', shrink the large title into the inline row as the page scrolls.

scrollContainer.description: Scrollable element to observe for collapseOnScroll. Defaults to window.

children.description: Optional extra row rendered below the toolbar (e.g., a search input, segmented control, tabs).

className.description: Additional CSS class for the bar root.

ariaLabel.description: Accessible name applied to the landmark <header>.
